title: 3 Family Money Mistakes You Might Be Making

segments.text: Many people mix family and finances poorly.
But the pressure to lend money can be overwhelming.
Your financial health matters too. Don't forget that.
Establish boundaries to protect your wealth.
Your peace of mind is worth its weight in gold.
Follow for the money mindset they don't teach you.

description: Mixing family with finances can lead to trouble. Prioritize your wealth! Follow for daily money wisdom! 📈
